aero_reformation.tooltip.nav_table: Right-click with Redstone Torch to toggle inverted mode
aero_reformation.tooltip.swivel.stiffnes: Right-click with Iron Ingot to cycle stiffness
aero_reformation.tooltip.swivel.swap: Right-click with Redstone Torch to toggle dual-drive mode
aero_reformation.tooltip.swivel.warn: Angle may deviate in dual-drive mode, faster speed = larger deviation
aero_reformation.tooltip.gimbal: Right-click with Redstone Torch to toggle inverted mode
aero_reformation.tooltip.levitite: Mineable with Silk Touch Golden Pickaxe
aero_reformation.tooltip.analog_transmis: Right-click with Redstone Torch to toggle Linear mode
aero_reformation.tooltip.synchronizer_sl: Right-click to bind to Master. Outputs redstone based on Master's facing and mode
aero_reformation.tooltip.synchronizer_ma: Outputs facing direction. Right-click with Redstone Torch to toggle mirror mode
aero_reformation.tooltip.ender_compass: Combine two compasses in crafting grid to bind a channel. Shift+Right-click to record position. Hold Right-click to throw and track location. Requires arrows in inventory (Survival)
